---
title: Guide
---

Each page solves one task. Skim for the one you need.

- [Multi-stage builds](multi-stage-builds.qmd) copies artifacts from a build
  stage into a slim final image.
- [BuildKit mounts](buildkit-mounts.qmd) scopes cache, secret, and bind mounts
  to the commands that need them.
- [Smart apt](smart-apt.qmd) installs packages, PPAs, and third-party repos
  without hand-writing `apt-get update`.
- [The run builder](run-builder.qmd) composes one `RUN` from Python, with
  dynamic commands, directory scoping, and file redirects.
- [Reusable helpers](reusable-helpers.qmd) factors repeated setup into a
  context manager.
- [Render from the CLI](render-from-the-cli.qmd) renders a recipe from the
  command line or from Python.

If you are new to docker-dsl, start with [Getting Started](../getting-started/).
